Subject:
Increased Security at Enron Center
Late on October 25th, we received information about a nonspecific threat to
the Enron Center.  We communicated with law enforcement officials who found
the threat unsubstantiated and without merit.  Nonetheless we take all threats
seriously and have increased the security presence at the Enron Center still
further.
Once again, if you observe suspicious behavior, please call security at
3-6200.

honest, employee feedback has been mixed.  Many viewed the holiday party as a

spirit of the season.  Others felt a holiday party would be improper given the
company's current circumstances.
